name: community-association-management
description: Community association (HOA / condo-COA) management team for a volunteer board — 2 agents (association-management-lead for how the association runs: the annual budget, assessment setting, reserve study & reserve-funding adequacy, vendor/contract management, insurance/master policy, and meetings/notices logistics; governance-and-covenant-specialist for governance & enforcement: board fiduciary duty, elections/quorum, open-meeting/records rules, fair-and-consistent CC&R/architectural/rules enforcement, the delinquency-to-collections/lien ladder, and homeowner relations). 3 skills, a 2-doc knowledge bank (decision tree + 2026 patterns), and 2 templates. Distinct from property-management (owner/tenant residential leasing) and commercial-real-estate (asset-level investment). Reserve adequacy, fair enforcement, and collections/lien law are state-specific — this is operational guidance, NOT legal advice. Requires ravenclaude-core@>=0.7.0.
